Setlist
Venue Info
Media Gallery
James H. Hilton Coliseum (Iowa State University of Science and Technology)
Ames, IA
Seating Capacity: 15104
Venue Type : Indoor Arena

Total Gigs: 4
  DMB  (4)

Longest Performance:
10.06.04 - Jimi Thing (16:17)

Song Liberations
  12.17.98 – Maker, The (after 1662 days)
Venue Picture
Description
Iowa State University sought to add 1,465 seats to Hilton Coliseum with the $5.8 million cost paid by an increase in the hotel/motel tax. Voters were asked to increase the tax by 2 percent to 7 percent, but said no.
